name: Harmon YouTube Music
description: Standalone YouTube Music provider pack for Google OAuth, playlist and library reads, recommendations, and Harmon session seeding.

notes: I keep Google OAuth state in a local JSON file.
API-key mode is supported for catalog-only reads, but library and playlist ownership require OAuth.

env.name: YOUTUBE_MUSIC_CLIENT_ID
env.description: Google OAuth client ID used by the local PKCE bootstrap.

env.name: YOUTUBE_MUSIC_CLIENT_SECRET
env.description: Optional client secret for desktop-style Google OAuth apps.

env.name: YOUTUBE_MUSIC_REDIRECT_URI
env.description: Local callback URL used by npm run auth.

env.name: YOUTUBE_MUSIC_OAUTH_SCOPES
env.description: Space-delimited Google scopes requested during bootstrap.

env.name: YOUTUBE_MUSIC_API_KEY
env.description: Optional catalog-only API key for non-user search mode.

notes: OAuth is the recommended mode because liked tracks and owned playlists require a signed-in user.
API-key mode remains useful for read-only search and public metadata.
